lyrics.text:
[verse]
Lost in the moments, I'm searching for a light
A guiding star to lead me through the darkest night
Every step forward, a chance to rewrite
A story untold, where I take flight

[chorus]
I'm chasing the horizon, and the ghosts of my past
I'm learning to let go, and leave the heartaches vast
I'm finding my way, through the twists and the turns
And I won't be held back, from the path that I've learned

[verse]
River of memories, flowing like a stream
Where the echoes whisper, of the dreams I've seen
Fading like the sun, as the seasons come and go
But the love and the laughter, will forever glow

[chorus]
I'm chasing the horizon, and the ghosts of my past
I'm learning to let go, and leave the heartaches vast
I'm finding my way, through the twists and the turns
And I won't be held back, from the path that I've learned

[bridge]
In the silence of the night, I hear a gentle voice
Whispering my name, and a heartfelt choice
To rise above the pain, and shine like the morning light
And let the beauty of tomorrow, guide me through the night

[chorus]
I'm chasing the horizon, and the ghosts of my past
I'm learning to let go, and leave the heartaches vast
I'm finding my way, through the twists and the turns
And I won't be held back, from the path that I've learned

lyrics.text:
[verse]
Rise up, let the darkness fade
A new dawn breaks, a brand new shade
We'll chase the shadows, we'll take the stage
Our hearts ablaze, our spirits engage

[chorus]
We'll light up the night, we'll make it feel alive
Electric energy, our hearts beating as one, we'll thrive
In this moment, we'll never back down
Our spirits soaring, our voices echoing all around

[verse]
We'll take the leap, we'll break the mold
Our dreams are calling, our hearts are bold
We'll chase the sun, we'll never look back
Our hearts on fire, our souls on the attack

[chorus]
We'll light up the night, we'll make it feel alive
Electric energy, our hearts beating as one, we'll thrive
In this moment, we'll never back down
Our spirits soaring, our voices echoing all around

[bridge]
In the silence, we'll find our voice
A whispered scream, a heartfelt choice
To rise above, to shine so bright
Our true selves, in this moment, take flight

[chorus]
We'll light up the night, we'll make it feel alive
Electric energy, our hearts beating as one, we'll thrive
In this moment, we'll never back down
Our spirits soaring, our voices echoing all around

title: Song QFAU

lyrics.label: Verse
lyrics.text: Midnight in the moss Your shadow learns to bloom Fern leaves hold their breath Under a silver moon The river turns to glass And bends around our feet I can hear the roots Knocking in a sleep Stay a little longer Let the night unfold Every little heartbeat We are now at the University of Minnesota The heartbeat turns the dark to gold Moonlit moss pull me close Moonlit moss, don't let go Under the trees I drift and glow Moonlit moss, take me home Fireflies in the grass, right circles in the air Bare hands on the bark like a prayer laid there The wind tastes like rain on a forgotten road You smile like a secret I already know Stay a little longer let the night unfold Every little heartbeat turns the dark to gold Moonlit moss, pull me close Moonlit moss, don't let go Under the trees I drift and glow Moonlit moss, take me home Moonlit moss Take me home I was lost in the noise You were green in the black Now the whole wide world Leans and calls me back Moonlit moss pull me close Moonlit moss, don't let go Under the trees I drift and glow Moonlit moss, take me home Moonlit moss, pull me close Moonlit moss, don't let go Under the trees I drift and glow Moonlit moss, take me home Take me home
